fix: Normalize numeric values like 1203 to UN1203; reject malformed values.

condition: proper_shipping_name must not start with a digit
fix: Columns likely shifted during extraction. Preserve original in _raw and re-parse.

condition: hazard_class must be present for a DG row
fix: Do not clear as road-ready until class is verified.

condition: adr_tunnel_code must be empty or one of A,B,C,D,E,B/D,B/E,C/D,C/E,D/E or known ADR quantity variants
fix: Flag for manual review; do not silently clean.

condition: same UN number may appear multiple times with different proper shipping name/packing group/classification details
fix: Do not deduplicate only by UN number. Use compound key.

condition: do not publish a full reproduced ADR Table A extracted from copyrighted PDFs
fix: Use licensed/open structured data or perform internal project-local ingestion without redistributing the full table.
